text:
In the first space, I feel a quiet anticipation. The sparse arrangement—just some beanbags and minimal furniture—invites reflection, as if anything could begin here at any moment. The silence echoes, making me acutely aware of my own presence.

In the second space, the vibrant colors and dynamic graphics energize me. The text and screens provoke curiosity; I feel engaged, surrounded by ideas about research and development. There is a sense of innovation and forward movement, as if I’m part of a living conversation between people and technology.
